svg.title: AI Recruitment System — Architecture v2
svg.desc: Updated architecture diagram: HR setup no longer has Top N preset. HR manually selects candidates after viewing ranked results.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about HR login and authentication')
sendPrompt('What does HR configure in the dashboard setup?')
sendPrompt('What is in the skills and roles dataset?')
sendPrompt('How does the credential auto-generation work?')
sendPrompt('How does email delivery work with SendGrid?')
sendPrompt('How does candidate login and experience selection work?')
sendPrompt('How does webcam proctoring work in the exam?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenAI generate exam questions from the dataset?')
sendPrompt('How does the exam timer and session expiry work?')

svg.text: Segments by band: Fresher → Tech + Analytical | Junior → + Domain | Senior → + Management

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the auto scoring system calculate results?')
sendPrompt('What does the database store for candidates?')
sendPrompt('How does HR view ranked results and manually select candidates?')
sendPrompt('How does HR upload resumes for selected candidates?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenAI parse resumes to extract skills?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenAI match resume skills against the JD?')
sendPrompt('How is the 90 percent match threshold applied?')
sendPrompt('What is the JD to resume match ID used for?')
sendPrompt('What does the filtered candidate profile view show HR?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenAI generate HR interview questions from resumes?')
sendPrompt('How does the HR final round work using AI generated questions?')
sendPrompt('What happens after the HR final round decision?')

svg.text: Frontend: React + Shadcn UI → deployed on Vercel
Backend: Python + FastAPI → deployed on Render
Database: PostgreSQL + Supabase | AI: OpenAI GPT-4o | Email: SendGrid | Proctoring: face-api.js
